index_name: Cambridge Associates US Private Equity Index
return_type: Calendar year, net of fees, pooled time-weighted return
note: Cambridge Associates does not publish this data set publicly for free. The values below are compiled from publicly available secondary references: Bain & Company's Global Private Equity Report (annual, 2016-2026 editions), academic papers by Kaplan, Sensoy, Harris, and Robinson, and financial press coverage (WSJ, Bloomberg, Institutional Investor). Numbers should be treated as widely-cited approximations, not authoritative. For definitive figures, subscribe to Cambridge Associates or consult a Bain, Bloomberg, or Preqin data feed.
sources: Bain & Company — Global Private Equity Report 2026
Bain & Company — Global Private Equity Report 2024, 2022, 2020, 2018, 2016
Kaplan, S. & Sensoy, B. — 'Private Equity Performance: A Survey' (Annual Review of Financial Economics, 2015)
Harris, R., Jenkinson, T. & Kaplan, S. — 'How Do Private Equity Investments Perform Compared to Public Equity?' (Journal of Investment Management, 2016)
Financial press coverage (Wall Street Journal, Financial Times, Bloomberg, Institutional Investor)
ytd_2026_note: PE returns are reported at a one-quarter lag. YTD 2026 figures are not yet available at time of last update.
since_inception_note: The CA US PE Index dates back to 1986. Since-inception net returns are widely cited at approximately 13-14% annualized. This page shows returns from 2001 onward to keep the comparison aligned with the ^SP500TR series (which begins in 2000).
